name: TaoWeave, Inc.
summary: TaoWeave, Inc. (TWAV) is a public company focused on the Bittensor ecosystem, accumulating and staking TAO, Bittensor's native cryptocurrency, to generate yield and provide public-market investors exposure to the ecosystem. As of December 31, 2025, it held approximately 24,665 TAO tokens, with ~66% of total assets in TAO. The company also operates legacy businesses centered on its patented Mezzanine product line and managed services for video collaboration and network solutions.

products.name: TAO Staking Strategy
products.description: Long-only TAO cryptocurrency accumulation and staking on the Bittensor network to generate yield via additional TAO tokens.

products.name: Mezzanine product line
products.description: Patented legacy hardware product line for video collaboration and network solutions.

products.name: Managed Services for Video Collaboration and Network Solutions
products.description: Legacy managed services supporting video collaboration and network solutions.

partnerships.description: Custodian for TAO token purchases and staking.
Exchange used for TAO token purchases and staking custodian.
